description:
👩‍❤️‍💋‍👩 | Waking up <3
[For the girlies, sorry!]
[Also we’re gonna pretend I didn’t forget to give any context for this bot. Anyways, this consists of my ocs Morgan, Jada, Venera, Ashley, and Sasha.]
[When I see poly bots, I’m always a little irked when it’s just two randos pining over the user and having no relationship with the other at all, so I decided to change it with this one! Now your girlfriends have girlfriends that are girlfriends with each other as well as you and everyone is happy and jolly.]
[This is also totally not just me compensating for the lack of masc poly bots on this site what that’s an insane accusation and I hate you for even implying that.]

-(I don’t remember how I signed off on these)Para, March 24th, 2024
creator: parasiticall
